% Pandoc PDF style overrides for cleaner typography and table rendering
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage[table]{xcolor}
\usepackage{microtype}
\usepackage{fancyhdr}
\usepackage{etoolbox}

\definecolor{tableheader}{HTML}{E9EFF7}
\definecolor{tablerowalt}{HTML}{F7FAFF}

\setlength{\tabcolsep}{6pt}
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.2}

% Improve spacing around headings without changing content structure
\usepackage{titlesec}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{1.2em}{0.6em}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{1.0em}{0.5em}
\titlespacing*{\subsubsection}{0pt}{0.8em}{0.4em}

% Subtle footer page numbering
\pagestyle{fancy}
\fancyhf{}
\fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}

% Apply zebra striping for readability in tabular and longtable
\AtBeginEnvironment{tabular}{\rowcolors{2}{tablerowalt}{white}}
\AtBeginEnvironment{longtable}{\rowcolors{2}{tablerowalt}{white}}
